name: Spawn sub-agent session
description: Create a NEW chat session and run the agent there with a focused prompt. Useful for parallelisable sub-tasks ('research this in the background while I keep asking questions'). Runs in sandbox mode with a shallower tool set. Returns the new session id and the sub-agent's answer.

title.description: A short title for the new session (≤ 80 chars).

prompt.description: The task for the sub-agent. Should be self-contained — the sub-agent doesn't see the parent's chat history.

thinking.description: Thinking level for the sub-run. Default low.
